name: Zucchini Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and honey until smooth.
2. Add the egg to the mixture and beat well until combined.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, cloves, salt, rolled oats, and raisins.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture alternately with grated zucchini, mixing gently until just combined.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the dough onto a parchment-lined baking sheet that has been sprayed with Pam cooking spray.
6. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 10-12 minutes, or until set and golden brown. Note: Baking times may vary depending on your oven.
7. Allow cookies to cool completely before serving. These taste like cake and are highly nutritious, making them an excellent choice for Brown Baggers.
